# project-cucumber tuning table. Edit va: # --- Core player stats (base values; effective = base * runtime mult) ---

player base max HP
flat damage reduction
HP regen per second baseline
XP pickup homing radius baseline
bullet visual+collider scale baseline
enemies a bullet passes through before despawning
crit probability 0..1
crit damage multiplier
max simultaneous burning stacks on one enemy
seconds between burn ticks
seconds a burn lasts; refreshed by each ApplyFire()
fallback freeze seconds when hit site passes 0 or less
Cone item: +/- spread of the 3-shot cone in degrees
Bounce item: OverlapCircle radius to find next target
Explode item: AoE radius = Range() * this
Freeze item: per-hit probability to apply freeze
Freeze item: seconds passed to ApplyFreeze
Aura item: constant-damage radius around the player
Aura item: seconds between aura damage ticks
Bot: damage = AttackDamage() * this
Bot: move/orbit speed multiplier
Bot: seconds between hits
Trail: seconds a trail segment persists
Trail: player travel distance between emitted segments
Trail: seconds between trail damage ticks
Grenadier: seconds between grenade throws
